source_files: Investor Solutions - DSCR (5-8 Units or 2-8 Mixed Use) (1).pdf

interest_only.note: 40-year term ARMs eligible with IO feature

cash_in_hand.note: Total equity withdrawn cannot exceed these limits. Not applicable to Delayed Financing transactions

dscr_calculation.method: Monthly gross rents based upon 12-month average (for seasonality). Gross rents reduced by 20% for extraordinary costs (advertising, furnishings, cleaning). If actual expenses > 20%, use actual. Min 20% expense factor required.
dscr_calculation.multiple_sources: When using multiple sources, lowest monthly income is utilized

requirements: Source of data used to complete STR analysis
Include comparable STR properties (room count, GLA, location, market appeal)
Include daily rental rate and occupancy percentage
Must be completed by licensed appraiser

acceptable_methods.method: 12-month rental history statement from 3rd party rental/management service
requirements: Qualifying income must be net of all vendor or management fees
Borrower must provide rental records for subject property to support monthly deposits
Gross rents = revenue projection less 20% extraordinary expense factor
Forecast period must cover 12 months and dated 90 days within Note date
Maximum occupancy limited to 2 individuals per bedroom
Must have 3 comparable properties similar in size, room count, amenities, availability, occupancy
Market Score or Sub-Market Score must be 60 or greater

investor_experience.experienced: Borrower/guarantor must have history of owning and managing commercial or non-owner occupied residential real estate for at least 1 year in last 3 years

restrictions: >= 36 months seasoning from any credit event

DSCR_1_to_4_Units.unleased_properties: All long-term rental refinances: vacant or unleased property allowed subject to max LTV 70%. Not applicable for short-term rentals.

purchase.gross_rents: Monthly rents established on FNMA Form 1007 or 1025 reflecting long term market rents
purchase.tenant_occupied: 1007 or 1025 must reflect current monthly rent. Evaluated per unit individually
purchase.higher_actual_lease: Evidence of 2 months receipt required, lease must be within 120% of estimated market rent. If exceeds 120%, rents capped at 120%
purchase.higher_market_rent: Must be within 120% of lease amount. If exceeds 120%, capped at 120%
purchase.rent_control_subsidy: Must use current contractual rent to calculate DSCR

required_docs: FNMA Form 1007 or 1025 reflecting long-term market rents
refinance.no_lease: LTV/CLTV limited to lesser of 70% or per DSCR/FICO/Loan balance matrix

vacant_property.ltv_limits: Lesser of 70% or per DSCR/FICO/Loan balance matrix

long_term_rental_income.dscr_formula: Monthly Gross Rents / PITIA (or ITIA) = DSCR

0_to_6_months.rate_term: Lesser of Purchase Price + Improvements or Appraisal
0_to_6_months.cash_out: Lesser of Purchase Price + Improvements or Appraisal

refinance_ownership_seasoning.rtl_renovation_cash_out: If purchased & renovated per appraisal w/ SSR of 2.5 and below, can use appraised value under 6 months ownership

underwriting_requirements.credit_score: Use representative credit score of borrower/guarantor with highest representative score

tradelines.min: 2 reporting 24 months w/activity in last 12 months or 3 reporting 12 months w/recent activity

structures: Fixed percentage of no less than 3%
Declining structures that do not exceed 5% and do not drop below 3% in first 3 years
prepayment_penalty.PA_restriction: Not allowed on loan amounts less than $319,777
prepayment_penalty.OH_restriction: 1-2 unit properties cannot exceed 1% of loan balance during 1st 5 years

DSCR_5_to_8_Units_and_Mixed_Use.program_name: Investor Solutions - DSCR (5-8 Units or 2-8 Mixed Use)

dscr_requirement.formula: Eligible monthly rents / PITIA (or ITIA for IO loans)
dscr_requirement.note: Reduce qualifying rents by any management fee reflected on appraisal report

mixed_use_2_to_8_units.commercial_space_limit: Must not exceed 49.99% of total building area

DSCR_5_to_8_Units_and_Mixed_Use.acreage: Property up to 2 acres, not meeting rural definition
DSCR_5_to_8_Units_and_Mixed_Use.eligibility_restrictions: Citizens and individuals from OFAC sanctioned countries are not eligible

investor_experience.experienced: Required - must have history of owning/managing commercial or non-owner occupied residential real estate for at least 1 year in last 3 years

DSCR_5_to_8_Units_and_Mixed_Use.declining_market: Maximum eligible LTVs do not require a market adjustment for 5-8 multifamily and 2-8 mixed use

income_requirements.leased: Use lower of estimated market rent or lease agreement

vacant_units.documentation: Screenshot of listing or other documentation

income_requirements.management_fee: Reduce qualifying rents by any management fee on appraisal report
income_requirements.mixed_use_income_limit: Income from commercial space must not exceed 49.99% of total property income

property_condition: No environmental issues (storage or use of hazardous material)
DSCR_5_to_8_Units_and_Mixed_Use.mixed_use_commercial: Limited to retail, restaurant, or office space. Residential/Commercial zoning acceptable. Vacant commercial space not allowed.

underwriting_requirements.credit_score: Use representative credit score of borrower/guarantor with highest representative score

tradelines.min: 2 reporting 24 months w/activity in last 12 months or 3 reporting 12 months w/recent activity
tradelines.3_scores: Minimum tradeline requirement waived (all borrowers evaluated individually)

prepayment_penalty.structures: Fixed percentage of no less than 3%
prepayment_penalty.PA_restriction: Not allowed on loan amounts less than $319,777

appraisals.5_to_8_residential: FHLMC 71A, FHLMC 71B, FNMA 1050 or similar short form; or narrative report
appraisals.2_to_8_mixed_use: General Purpose Commercial Forms (CoreLogic a la mode)
appraisals.full_interior_inspection: Required for all units with photos
required_attachments: Sketch or floor plan of typical units
appraisals.review_product: Commercial BPO or second appraisal (PA and NC: commercial evaluation product instead of BPO)
